metadata.description: Multi-Scale Spatio-Temporal Event Description for ITS collision clip 3

scene_description: The video captures a high-angle view of a signalized four-way intersection in an urban setting. Multiple lanes of traffic converge at the junction with visible lane markings, crosswalks, and traffic signals. Three vehicles are visible: a white sedan preparing to turn left, a red sedan approaching straight through the intersection, and a maroon sedan waiting behind the white sedan. The weather is clear with good visibility.

temporal_spatial_localization.description: Normal traffic flow at the signalized intersection. The white sedan at the top of the frame begins moving forward. The maroon sedan behind it remains stationary. A red sedan approaches from the bottom right traveling straight.
The white sedan initiates a left-hand turn across oncoming traffic without yielding to the red sedan, which continues straight through the intersection.
temporal_spatial_localization.spatial_region: Center of intersection, left-turn conflict zone

temporal_spatial_localization.description: T-bone collision: the red sedan strikes the passenger side of the white sedan. Both vehicles lose momentum. The white sedan is pushed across the crosswalk.
temporal_spatial_localization.spatial_region: Center-right of intersection, across marked crosswalk

temporal_spatial_localization.description: Both vehicles come to rest in the intersection, blocking traffic. The maroon sedan has stopped safely without involvement.

event_description.description: A white sedan failed to yield while making a left turn at a signalized intersection, resulting in a T-bone collision with a red sedan traveling straight. Both vehicles ended up immobilized in the intersection, with the white sedan pushed across a marked crosswalk.
event_description.temporal_description: The left turn initiates at approximately frame 60 (2.0s). Contact occurs at frame 114 (3.8s). Both vehicles are at rest by frame 147 (4.9s). Total event duration: approximately 2.9 seconds.
event_description.spatial_location: Center of the signalized four-way intersection, with the white sedan's final position across the pedestrian crosswalk on the right side of the frame.
event_description.cause: The white sedan initiated a left-hand turn across oncoming traffic without yielding the right-of-way to the red sedan, which had priority traveling straight through the intersection.
event_description.consequence: Both vehicles sustained significant damage and became immobilized in the intersection, blocking multiple lanes of traffic. The white sedan was pushed into the pedestrian crossing area, creating a hazard for pedestrians. The maroon sedan behind was forced to remain stationary.
